title: Jeyes 4-in-1 Patio and Decking Power, Outdoor Cleaner for Patios, Paths, Driveways, Stone & Concrete, 2 Litres
features: After a long winter, our patios often need a bit of TLC to help them back to their best for the summer weather
If you’re looking to quickly and easily remove mould, mildew, algae, dirt or other stubborn stains from any hard-paved areas, then Jeyes 4 in 1 Patio & Decking Power is the outdoor cleaner for you
The formula slows regrowth for longer lasting results without the need for scrubbing on hard surfaces and kills 99.9% of germs, Simply mix, apply and leave to dry
It’s not just for patios & deckings, it also works fantastically as a driveway and tarmac cleaner, meaning you need just one product for a handful of tasks, IT is also power washer compatible
Works instantly with visible results killing mould & algae in 1 - 3 days, Covers up to 90m2, Proven reliable Jeyes technology
